name: GOLF LESSONS AND SWING ANALYSIS
address: 615 N Berry St # E, Brea, CA 92821
about: Golf Code 360 Studios is a premier golf instruction and swing analysis facility located in Brea, California. The studio utilizes advanced technology including video analysis software, launch monitors, 3D motion capture, and high-speed cameras to provide comprehensive coaching. Founded by Jay Lim, the facility operates on a philosophy of training the mind, body, and game, offering structured programs designed to accelerate player development from beginner to advanced levels. The instruction is centered around the proprietary B.E.S.T. System, a methodology focused on developing repeating motions with a proven track record of helping golfers achieve single-digit handicaps in a matter of months.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to cutting-edge technology like 3D motion capture and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Proprietary B.E.S.T. System that accelerates skill development with a proven record of fast improvement
A satisfaction guarantee for the first lesson, demonstrating confidence in the coaching methodology

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy

simulator_hardware.notes: Website mentions video analysis, launch monitors, and 3D motion capture but does not specify hardware brands

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but it is standard practice to bring your own golf equipment for lessons. Beginners may use provided clubs if available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink policies on the website, indicating outside food and drinks may not be permitted during instructional sessions.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide simulator play information. As a training studio focused on instruction, the primary activities are lessons and swing analysis, not full rounds of golf.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf Code 360 Studios is kid-friendly. The facility offers coaching for golfers of all ages and skill levels, and the instructor mentions his own children.
